content: Hey, I'm getting married next year, and I'm looking for some ideas for our bachelor party. We're thinking of having it in Las Vegas.
Congratulations on your upcoming wedding! Las Vegas is a great location for a bachelor party. What kind of activities were you thinking of doing?
We're thinking of having a mountain biking trip in Red Rock Canyon, since I'm really into mountain biking. And maybe some board game tournaments at the hotel.
That sounds like a lot of fun. Have you thought about the accommodations for your group?
Yeah, we're thinking of staying at the Bellagio. And we're planning to have the bachelor party on April 15th, 2024.
Okay, that's a good location. What's your budget for the bachelor party?
We're thinking of spending around $10,000. And we're planning to have a leatherworking workshop, since I'm really into leatherworking.
That sounds like a unique and interesting idea. Have you thought about the food and drinks for the party?
Yeah, we're thinking of having a buffet-style dinner, and maybe some baking competitions, since I'm really into baking sourdough.
That sounds delicious. I can help you with the logistics of the party. What's the name of your best man?
His name is Ryan, and he's really into board games. We're thinking of having a big board game tournament at the party.
That sounds like a lot of fun. Is there anything else you need help with?
No, that's all for now. Thanks for your help, and I'll talk to you soon!
You're welcome, Frankie. I'm looking forward to helping you with your bachelor party plans.
And can you also remind me to pick up some supplies from the BioGenesis Pharma lab on Friday?
I've got that noted down. You work at BioGenesis Pharma, right?
